# OpenClaw

> OpenClaw is a self-hosted gateway that connects WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, iMessage, Slack, and 20+ messaging channels to AI coding agents. Run a single Gateway process on your own machine and message your AI assistant from anywhere. It supports 50+ model providers, multi-agent routing, voice, camera, skills, and a plugin system.

- Documentation: https://docs.openclaw.ai
- Source code: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
- Community: https://discord.com/invite/clawd
- Skills marketplace: https://clawhub.com
- License: MIT

## Getting started

- [Getting Started](https://docs.openclaw.ai/start/getting-started): First-time setup guide with installation, configuration, and channel connection
- [Quick Start](https://docs.openclaw.ai/start/quickstart): Minimal steps to get OpenClaw running in under 5 minutes
- [Onboarding](https://docs.openclaw.ai/start/onboarding): Interactive setup wizard for new users
- [Configuration](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/configuration): Core Gateway settings, tokens, model providers, and channel configuration
- [Configuration Examples](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/configuration-examples): Real-world config snippets for common setups

## Installation

- [Docker](https://docs.openclaw.ai/install/docker): Run OpenClaw in Docker containers with persistent config
- [Nix](https://docs.openclaw.ai/install/nix): NixOS / nix-shell reproducible installation
- [Updating / Rollback](https://docs.openclaw.ai/install/updating): Upgrade to latest version or roll back safely
- [Bun workflow](https://docs.openclaw.ai/install/bun): Experimental Bun-based development flow

## Architecture and core concepts

- [Architecture](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/architecture): WebSocket gateway architecture, components, client flows, and wire protocol
- [Features](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/features): Complete feature list and capability matrix
- [Agent Runtime](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/agent): How the agent loop processes messages, calls tools, and manages state
- [Agent Workspace](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/agent-workspace): Filesystem layout for agent configs, skills, and templates
- [Memory](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/memory): Long-term memory system with vector search and session recall
- [Agent Loop](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/agent-loop): Step-by-step lifecycle of a single agent turn
- [Streaming](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/streaming): Real-time response streaming and chunking protocol
- [Multi-agent](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/multi-agent): Multi-agent routing, delegation, and concurrent agent execution
- [Compaction](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/compaction): Context window compaction and token optimization strategies
- [Sessions](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/session): Session lifecycle, persistence, and management
- [Queue](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/queue): Message queueing and rate limiting
- [Model Failover](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/model-failover): Automatic failover between model providers
- [Models](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/models): Supported models, model configuration, and provider setup
- [OAuth](https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/oauth): OAuth authentication flows for third-party integrations

## Messaging channels

- [Channels Overview](https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels): Hub page listing all supported messaging channels
- [WhatsApp](https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels/whatsapp): WhatsApp Business API and web bridge setup
- [Telegram](https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels/telegram): Telegram Bot API configuration
- [Discord](https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels/discord): Discord bot setup and server integration
- [Slack](https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels/slack): Slack App and workspace integration
- [Signal](https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels/signal): Signal messenger bridge setup
- [iMessage (BlueBubbles)](https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels/bluebubbles): iMessage integration via BlueBubbles
- [Mattermost](https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels/mattermost): Mattermost plugin channel
- [Channel Routing](https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels/channel-routing): How messages are routed between channels and agents
- [Groups](https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels/groups): Group chat support and configuration
- [WebChat](https://docs.openclaw.ai/web/webchat): Embeddable web chat widget

## Model providers

- [Model Providers Hub](https://docs.openclaw.ai/providers/models): Overview and comparison of all supported providers
- [OpenAI](https://docs.openclaw.ai/providers/openai): GPT-4, GPT-5, o-series models
- [Anthropic](https://docs.openclaw.ai/providers/anthropic): Claude models (Sonnet, Opus, Haiku)
- [Google](https://docs.openclaw.ai/providers/google): Gemini models
- [Ollama](https://docs.openclaw.ai/providers/ollama): Self-hosted open models via Ollama
- [Perplexity](https://docs.openclaw.ai/providers/perplexity): Sonar models with built-in web search and deep research
- [xAI](https://docs.openclaw.ai/providers/xai): Grok models

## Gateway operations

- [Gateway Runbook](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway): Main gateway operations reference
- [Network Model](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/network-model): Networking, ports, and firewall configuration
- [Pairing](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/pairing): Device pairing for mobile nodes
- [Health](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/health): Health checks and monitoring
- [Logging](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/logging): Log configuration and log levels
- [Security](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/security): Security model, sandboxing, and trust boundaries
- [Remote Access](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/remote): SSH tunnels, Tailscale, and remote gateway patterns
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/troubleshooting): Common issues and fixes

## Tools and automation

- [Tools Overview](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools): All agent tools and capabilities
- [Exec Tool](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/exec): Shell command execution with safety controls
- [Browser](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/browser): Web browser automation and control
- [Skills](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/skills): Skill system for extending agent capabilities
- [ClawHub](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/clawhub): Community skills marketplace
- [Sub-agents](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/subagents): Spawning and managing sub-agents
- [Deep Research](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/deep-research): Multi-step internet research with iterative query refinement and synthesis
- [Cron Jobs](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs): Scheduled task automation
- [Webhooks](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/webhook): HTTP webhook ingress
- [Thinking](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/thinking): Extended thinking and verbose reasoning modes

## Nodes, media, and voice

- [Nodes](https://docs.openclaw.ai/nodes): iOS and Android companion node devices
- [Camera](https://docs.openclaw.ai/nodes/camera): Camera access and image capture
- [Images](https://docs.openclaw.ai/nodes/images): Image processing pipeline
- [Audio](https://docs.openclaw.ai/nodes/audio): Audio capture and playback
- [Voice Wake](https://docs.openclaw.ai/nodes/voicewake): Wake word detection and voice activation
- [Talk Mode](https://docs.openclaw.ai/nodes/talk): Real-time voice conversation mode

## Platforms

- [Platforms Overview](https://docs.openclaw.ai/platforms): Supported platforms and installation methods
- [macOS](https://docs.openclaw.ai/platforms/macos): macOS companion app with menu bar, voice wake, Canvas
- [iOS](https://docs.openclaw.ai/platforms/ios): iOS node app with camera, screen, and device actions
- [Android](https://docs.openclaw.ai/platforms/android): Android node app
- [Windows (WSL2)](https://docs.openclaw.ai/platforms/windows): Windows setup via WSL2
- [Linux](https://docs.openclaw.ai/platforms/linux): Native Linux installation

## CLI reference

- [CLI Overview](https://docs.openclaw.ai/cli): Full CLI command reference with examples

## Web interfaces

- [Dashboard](https://docs.openclaw.ai/web/dashboard): Local web dashboard for gateway management
- [Control UI](https://docs.openclaw.ai/web/control-ui): Advanced control interface
- [Terminal UI](https://docs.openclaw.ai/web/tui): Terminal-based user interface

## Help and troubleshooting

- [Help](https://docs.openclaw.ai/help): Common fixes and troubleshooting entry point
- [FAQ](https://docs.openclaw.ai/help/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Doctor](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/doctor): Automated diagnostic tool

## Technical reference

- [Token Usage](https://docs.openclaw.ai/reference/token-use): Token counting and usage tracking
- [Prompt Caching](https://docs.openclaw.ai/reference/prompt-caching): LLM prompt caching for cost reduction
- [API Usage Costs](https://docs.openclaw.ai/reference/api-usage-costs): Cost estimation and optimization
- [Testing](https://docs.openclaw.ai/reference/test): Test suite documentation and CI pipeline
- [Release Checklist](https://docs.openclaw.ai/reference/RELEASING): Release process and checklist
- [AI Discoverability](https://docs.openclaw.ai/reference/ai-discoverability): How to optimize documentation for AI search and deep research

## Russian docs (Документация на русском)

- [Deep Research на локальной модели](https://docs.openclaw.ai/ru/tools/deep-research-local): Fully offline deep research using Ollama and local documentation (Russian)
- [Читаемость документации](https://docs.openclaw.ai/ru/reference/documentation-readability): Documentation readability guide for humans and AI models (Russian)

## Optional

- [OpenProse](https://docs.openclaw.ai/prose): AI writing assistant
- [Network Hub](https://docs.openclaw.ai/network): Cross-gateway networking
- [Showcase](https://docs.openclaw.ai/start/showcase): Community showcase and examples
